understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the player to the goal gem tile, marked as '+', in each level. The player must avoid landing on spike tiles, as these end the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was by issuing left and right moves; gravity automatically pulled the player down after moving unless blocked. Clicks were used to remove specific clickable tiles from the map, which could change the path or open new routes. Hazards like spike tiles ended the attempt upon contact. Each attempt had 50 turns to reach the goal, with 2 allowed attempts per level. Undo was not explicitly observed in my episode.
